goal: Compare seven FigureAgent component scores while rendering an external title and note outside the plotting area.

context.result_summary: Scores increase as the system adds stronger planning, rendering, criticism, and integration stages.
context.figure_title: Component Contribution Across the FigureAgent Pipeline
context.figure_subtitle: Seven-stage single-series bar chart with external title, subtitle, note, and footer.
figure_notes: Values are synthetic demonstration scores normalized to the [0, 1] interval.
